catalog_metadata.description: Infrastructure and devops specialist agent for Azure resource inspection, pipeline operations, and model/agent deployment via Foundry.
differentiators: Azure Pipelines-only CI/CD authority enforcement (per CLAUDE.md doctrine)

tool_surface: azure_mcp_server (Azure resource graph, ARM, cost queries — 40+ Azure services)
azure_devops_mcp_server (ADO project ipai-platform — pipelines, work items, repos, wiki)
foundry_mcp_server (model catalog, agent eval, deployment operations)
github_mcp (conditional — InsightPulseAI/odoo repo context when needed)

ipai_tenant: Reader on subscription (Azure subscription 1 + Microsoft Azure Sponsorship) — for inspection only
NO data-plane access (no PG MCP, no Document Intelligence, no Storage write)
ADO Basic access on ipai-platform project
Contributor on rg-ipai-dev-platform (ACA app deploy/restart only)

kpi_ownership: Azure cost per agent-call (via appi-ipai-dev-agent-sea traces)
forbidden_actions: Deploy via GitHub Actions (CLAUDE.md: Azure Pipelines is sole CI/CD authority)
Call PG MCP directly (route to pulser-finance)
Mutate resources without operator approval (Tier 2 + Tier 3 safe outputs)
